response:
Sec. 1  
[THE WRITER IS CONSIDERING TWO PUBLISHERS BASED ON THEIR OFFERS FOR A MANUSCRIPT.]  

Sec. 2  
[PUBLISHER A OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 3000 DOLLARS PLUS 5 PERCENT OF THE BOOKS SALES REVENUE.]  

Sec. 3  
[PUBLISHER B OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 1500 DOLLARS PLUS 10 PERCENT OF THE BOOKS SALES REVENUE.]  

Sec. 4  
[TO DETERMINE WHEN PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE THAN PUBLISHER B, WE NEED TO SET UP AN INEQUALITY.]  

Sec. 5  
[THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 PLUS 0.05X GREATER THAN 1500 PLUS 0.10X.]  

Sec. 6  
[SOLVING THIS INEQUALITY, WE GET 3000 MINUS 1500 GREATER THAN 0.10X MINUS 0.05X.]  

Sec. 7  
[THIS SIMPLIFIES TO 1500 GREATER THAN 0.05X, WHICH MEANS X IS LESS THAN 30000.]  

Sec. 8  
[THUS, IF THE SALES REVENUE IS BETWEEN 10000 AND 30000 DOLLARS, PUBLISHER A IS MORE BENEFICIAL.]
